claims.statement: Official example notice confirms expanded AI startup support program eligibility criteria.

claims.summary: Staged official example on support program criteria (sample only).
claims.why_it_matters: Eligibility changes can unlock non-dilutive runway for domestic AI teams.
claims.business_implication: Founders should map revised criteria to application timelines.
